title: BPR SUPERPACK
description: This BPR SUPERPACK is optimized with the most useful options to keep minecraft as normal as possible, no shaders and no animations. But a better F3, zoom option, minimap and waypoints that you can place. It also has a slightly nicer layout in the chat.
body:
This pack includes several useful features to enhance your Minecraft experience while keeping the game as close to vanilla as possible. The pack offers:

A minimap where you can set waypoints,
An improved coordinates menu,
A redesigned food bar showing your health and hunger more clearly,
The ability to zoom in on distances,
Built-in voice chat for playing with friends or other players,
A recording mod to capture epic moments with your friends and a worldmap.
This is the perfect modpack for players who want to keep Minecraft feeling original but enjoy a few quality-of-life improvements.
